app_purpose: Nursing Rocks! Concert Series — Full-stack web application for managing and showcasing concert events, featuring video streaming, event management, job board, artist profiles, email subscriptions, and admin/employer dashboards.
app_description: React + TypeScript frontend (Vite) + Express.js/Fastify backend with PostgreSQL database (Drizzle ORM). Supports video uploads via Backblaze B2, JWT authentication, Sentry error tracking, and multi-role access (public users, employers, admins).

critical_user_paths.name: Public User: Browse Concerts and Event Details
critical_user_paths.description: User visits home page, browses concert list, clicks on concert, views event details

critical_user_paths.name: User Registration and Login
critical_user_paths.description: New user signs up, creates profile, logs in with JWT

critical_user_paths.name: User Profile Creation and Management
critical_user_paths.description: Authenticated user creates or updates profile (name, email, specialties, years of experience)

critical_user_paths.name: Browse and Apply for Jobs
critical_user_paths.description: User finds jobs on job board, applies for position

critical_user_paths.name: Admin: Upload and Manage Videos
critical_user_paths.description: Admin user uploads concert videos for streaming
critical_user_paths.external_services: Backblaze B2, FFmpeg for HLS conversion

critical_user_paths.name: Employer: Post Job and Review Applications
critical_user_paths.description: Employer posts new job listing, reviews and manages applications

critical_user_paths.name: Email Subscription and Notifications
critical_user_paths.description: User subscribes to email updates (job alerts, event reminders)

known_limitations: Database state management: Tests must manage migrations and clean up between runs (use test database or transactions)
External services (S3/B2, email, Sentry): May require mocking or test credentials
Video upload/HLS processing: Slow operation, may need to mock or use test fixtures
JWT token generation: Tests should use fixed secret keys for reproducibility
File uploads: Tests cannot realistically test large file uploads; mock file I/O
Email sending: Must mock email service to avoid sending test emails
Rate limiting: Rate limit middleware may interfere with test execution; may need to disable in test mode

external_dependencies.name: PostgreSQL Database
external_dependencies.purpose: Persistent data storage (users, profiles, jobs, concerts, videos, etc.)
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Use test database or in-memory SQLite for unit tests; Docker for integration tests

external_dependencies.name: Backblaze B2 / AWS S3
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Mock B2 SDK calls; use fake/test credentials for integration tests

external_dependencies.name: Email Service (Sendgrid/SMTP)
external_dependencies.purpose: Send job alerts and event reminders
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Mock email service; verify email payload without sending

external_dependencies.name: Sentry (Error Tracking)
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Mock Sentry SDK; verify error capture without network calls

external_dependencies.name: FFmpeg (Video Processing)
external_dependencies.purpose: HLS stream generation for video uploads
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Mock FFmpeg calls; test with pre-generated HLS fixtures

external_dependencies.name: Claude Code CLI
external_dependencies.purpose: External tool for autonomous build completion
external_dependencies.test_strategy: Mock if called; verify integration points

testing_strategy.integration_tests: API endpoint tests with mocked database and external services
testing_strategy.critical_path_tests: End-to-end flows for all 7 critical user paths
testing_strategy.fraud_prevention: Verify tests are real (not empty, mocked, or skipped)
